25 #include <stdint.h>
26 
38 typedef enum mw_venc_frame_type
39 {
40  MW_VENC_FRAME_TYPE_UNKNOWN,
41  MW_VENC_FRAME_TYPE_IDR,
42  MW_VENC_FRAME_TYPE_I,
43  MW_VENC_FRAME_TYPE_P,
44  MW_VENC_FRAME_TYPE_B,
45  MW_VENC_FRAME_TYPE_COUNT
46 }mw_venc_frame_type_t;
47 
58 typedef struct mw_venc_frame_info
59 {
60  mw_venc_frame_type_t frame_type;
61  int32_t delay;
62  int64_t pts;
63 }mw_venc_frame_info_t;
64 
73 typedef void(*MW_ENCODER_CALLBACK)(void * user_ptr, const uint8_t * p_frame, uint32_t frame_len, mw_venc_frame_info_t *p_frame_info);
74 
84 typedef enum mw_venc_platform
85 {
86  MW_VENC_PLATFORM_UNKNOWN =0,
87  MW_VENC_PLATFORM_AMD =1,
88  MW_VENC_PLATFORM_INTEL =2,
89  MW_VENC_PLATFORM_NVIDIA =4,
90  MW_VENC_PLATFORM_COUNT
91 }mw_venc_platform_t;
92 
104 typedef enum mw_venc_code_type
105 {
106  MW_VENC_CODE_TYPE_UNKNOWN,
107  MW_VENC_CODE_TYPE_AVC,
108  MW_VENC_CODE_TYPE_HEVC,
109  MW_VENC_CODE_TYPE_H264 = MW_VENC_CODE_TYPE_AVC,
110  MW_VENC_CODE_TYPE_H265 = MW_VENC_CODE_TYPE_HEVC,
111  MW_VENC_CODE_TYPE_COUNT
112 }mw_venc_code_type_t;
113 
125 typedef enum mw_venc_targetusage
126 {
127  MW_VENC_TARGETUSAGE_UNKNOWN,
128  MW_VENC_TARGETUSAGE_BEST_QUALITY,
129  MW_VENC_TARGETUSAGE_BALANCED,
130  MW_VENC_TARGETUSAGE_BEST_SPEED,
131  MW_VENC_TARGETUSAGE_COUNT
132 }mw_venc_targetusage_t;
133 
147 typedef enum mw_venc_rate_control_mode
148 {
149  MW_VENC_RATECONTROL_UNKNOWN,
150  MW_VENC_RATECONTROL_CBR,
151  MW_VENC_RATECONTROL_VBR,
152  MW_VENC_RATECONTROL_CQP,
153  MW_VENC_RATECONTROL_COUNT
154 }mw_venc_rate_control_mode_t;
155 
167 typedef enum mw_venc_profile
168 {
169  MW_VENC_PROFILE_UNKNOWN,
170  MW_VENC_PROFILE_H264_BASELINE,
171  MW_VENC_PROFILE_H264_MAIN,
172  MW_VENC_PROFILE_H264_HIGH,
173  MW_VENC_PROFILE_H265_MAIN,
174  MW_VENC_PROFILE_COUNT
175 }mw_venc_profile_t;
176 
188 typedef enum mw_venc_level
189 {
190  MW_VENC_LEVEL_UNKNOWN,
191  MW_VENC_LEVEL_2_1,
192  MW_VENC_LEVEL_3_1,
193  MW_VENC_LEVEL_4_1,
194  MW_VENC_LEVEL_5_1,
195  MW_VENC_LEVEL_5_2,
196  MW_VENC_LEVEL_6_1,
197  MW_VENC_LEVEL_6_2,
198  MW_VENC_LEVEL_COUNT
199 }mw_venc_level_t;
200 
212 typedef enum mw_venc_fourcc
213 {
214  MW_VENC_FOURCC_UNKNOWN,
215  MW_VENC_FOURCC_NV12,
216  MW_VENC_FOURCC_NV21,
217  MW_VENC_FOURCC_YV12,
218  MW_VENC_FOURCC_I420,
219  MW_VENC_FOURCC_YUY2,
220  MW_VENC_FOURCC_P010,
221  MW_VENC_FOURCC_BGRA,
222  MW_VENC_FOURCC_RGBA,
223  MW_VENC_FOURCC_ARGB,
224  MW_VENC_FOURCC_ABGR,
225  MW_VENC_FOURCC_RGB32_FILTER,
226  MW_VENC_FOURCC_COUNT
227 }mw_venc_fourcc_t;
228 
243 typedef struct mw_venc_rate_control
244 {
245  mw_venc_rate_control_mode_t mode;
246  union{
247  struct {
248  uint32_t target_bitrate;
249  uint32_t max_bitrate;
250  };
251  struct {
252  uint8_t qpi;
253  uint8_t qpb;
254  uint8_t qpp;
255  uint8_t reserved;
256  };
257  };
258 }mw_venc_rate_control_t;
259 
273 typedef struct mw_venc_fps{
274  int32_t num;
275  int32_t den;
276 }mw_venc_fps_t;
277 
288 typedef struct mw_venc_extdata {
289  uint8_t *p_extdata;
290  uint32_t extdata_len;
291  uint32_t len[3];
292 }mw_venc_extdata_t;
293 
302 typedef enum mw_venc_property
303 {
304  MW_VENC_PROPERTY_UNKNOWN,
305  MW_VENC_PROPERTY_RATE_CONTROL,
306  MW_VENC_PROPERTY_FPS,
307  MW_VENC_PROPERTY_GOP_SIZE,
308  MW_VENC_PROPERTY_SLICE_NUM,
309  MW_VENC_PROPERTY_GOP_REF_SIZE,
310  MW_VENC_PROPERTY_EXTDATA,
311  MW_VENC_PROPERTY_FORCE_IDR,
312  MW_VENC_PROPERTY_COUNT
313 }mw_venc_property_t;
314 
320 typedef enum mw_venc_status
321 {
322  MW_VENC_STATUS_SUCCESS,
323  MW_VENC_STATUS_FAIL,
324  MW_VENC_STATUS_UNSUPPORT,
325  MW_VENC_STATUS_BUSY,
326  MW_VENC_STATUS_INVALID_PARAM,
327  MW_VENC_STATUS_UNKNOWN_ERROR,
328  MW_VENC_STATUS_COUNT
329 }mw_venc_status_t;
330 
339 typedef enum mw_venc_amd_mem_type {
340  MW_VENC_AMD_MEM_AUTO,
341  MW_VENC_AMD_MEM_CPU,
342  MW_VENC_AMD_MEM_DX9,
343  MW_VENC_AMD_MEM_DX11,
344  MW_VENC_AMD_MEM_OPENGL,
345  MW_VENC_AMD_MEM_VULKAN,
346  MW_VENC_AMD_MEM_COUNT
347 }mw_venc_amd_mem_type_t;
348 
349 //
350 
357 typedef enum mw_venc_color_primaries {
358  MW_VENC_COLOR_PRI_RESERVED0 = 0,
359  MW_VENC_COLOR_PRI_BT709 = 1,
360  MW_VENC_COLOR_PRI_UNSPECIFIED = 2,
361  MW_VENC_COLOR_PRI_RESERVED = 3,
362  MW_VENC_COLOR_PRI_BT470M = 4,
363 
364  MW_VENC_COLOR_PRI_BT470BG = 5,
365  MW_VENC_COLOR_PRI_SMPTE170M = 6,
366  MW_VENC_COLOR_PRI_SMPTE240M = 7,
367  MW_VENC_COLOR_PRI_FILM = 8,
368  MW_VENC_COLOR_PRI_BT2020 = 9,
369  MW_VENC_COLOR_PRI_SMPTE428 = 10,
370  MW_VENC_COLOR_PRI_SMPTEST428_1 = MW_VENC_COLOR_PRI_SMPTE428,
371  MW_VENC_COLOR_PRI_SMPTE431 = 11,
372  MW_VENC_COLOR_PRI_SMPTE432 = 12,
373  MW_VENC_COLOR_PRI_JEDEC_P22 = 22,
374  MW_VENC_COLOR_PRI_COUNT
375 }mw_venc_color_primaries_t;
376 
383 typedef enum mw_venc_color_transfer_characteristic {
384  MW_VENC_COLOR_TRC_RESERVED0 = 0,
385  MW_VENC_COLOR_TRC_BT709 = 1,
386  MW_VENC_COLOR_TRC_UNSPECIFIED = 2,
387  MW_VENC_COLOR_TRC_RESERVED = 3,
388  MW_VENC_COLOR_TRC_GAMMA22 = 4,
389  MW_VENC_COLOR_TRC_GAMMA28 = 5,
390  MW_VENC_COLOR_TRC_SMPTE170M = 6,
391  MW_VENC_COLOR_TRC_SMPTE240M = 7,
392  MW_VENC_COLOR_TRC_LINEAR = 8,
393  MW_VENC_COLOR_TRC_LOG = 9,
394  MW_VENC_COLOR_TRC_LOG_SQRT = 10,
395  MW_VENC_COLOR_TRC_IEC61966_2_4 = 11,
396  MW_VENC_COLOR_TRC_BT1361_ECG = 12,
397  MW_VENC_COLOR_TRC_IEC61966_2_1 = 13,
398  MW_VENC_COLOR_TRC_BT2020_10 = 14,
399  MW_VENC_COLOR_TRC_BT2020_12 = 15,
400  MW_VENC_COLOR_TRC_SMPTE2084 = 16,
401  MW_VENC_COLOR_TRC_SMPTEST2084 = MW_VENC_COLOR_TRC_SMPTE2084,
402  MW_VENC_COLOR_TRC_SMPTE428 = 17,
403  MW_VENC_COLOR_TRC_SMPTEST428_1 = MW_VENC_COLOR_TRC_SMPTE428,
404  MW_VENC_COLOR_TRC_ARIB_STD_B67 = 18,
405  MW_VENC_COLOR_TRC_COUNT
406 }mw_venc_color_transfer_characteristic_t;
407 
414 typedef enum mw_venc_color_space {
415  MW_VENC_COLOR_SPACE_RGB = 0,
416  MW_VENC_COLOR_SPACE_BT709 = 1,
417  MW_VENC_COLOR_SPACE_UNSPECIFIED = 2,
418  MW_VENC_COLOR_SPACE_RESERVED = 3,
419  MW_VENC_COLOR_SPACE_FCC = 4,
420  MW_VENC_COLOR_SPACE_BT470BG = 5,
421  MW_VENC_COLOR_SPACE_SMPTE170M = 6,
422  MW_VENC_COLOR_SPACE_SMPTE240M = 7,
423  MW_VENC_COLOR_SPACE_YCGCO = 8,
424  MW_VENC_COLOR_SPACE_YCOCG = MW_VENC_COLOR_SPACE_YCGCO,
425  MW_VENC_COLOR_SPACE_BT2020_NCL = 9,
426  MW_VENC_COLOR_SPACE_BT2020_CL = 10,
427  MW_VENC_COLOR_SPACE_SMPTE2085 = 11,
428  MW_VENC_COLOR_SPACE_CHROMA_DERIVED_NCL = 12,
429  MW_VENC_COLOR_SPACE_CHROMA_DERIVED_CL = 13,
430  MW_VENC_COLOR_SPACE_ICTCP = 14,
431  MW_VENC_COLOR_SPACE_COUNT
432 }mw_venc_color_space_t;
433 
434 typedef enum mw_venc_frame_field_mode {
435  MW_VENC_FRAME_FIELD_MODE_PROGRESSIVE = 0x00,
436  MW_VENC_FRAME_FIELD_MODE_FIELD = 0x01,
437  MW_VENC_FRAME_FIELD_MODE_MBAFF = 0x02,
438  MW_VENC_FRAME_FIELD_MODE_COUNT
439 }mw_venc_frame_field_mode_t;
440 
441 typedef enum mw_venc_pic_struct {
442  MW_VENC_PICSTRUCT_PROGRESSIVE = 0x00,
443  MW_VENC_PICSTRUCT_FIELD_TFF = 0x01,
444  MW_VENC_PICSTRUCT_FIELD_BFF = 0x02,
445  MW_VENC_PICSTRUCT_COUNT
446 }mw_venc_pic_struct_t;
447 
466 typedef struct mw_venc_param {
467  mw_venc_code_type_t code_type;
468  mw_venc_fourcc_t fourcc;
469  mw_venc_targetusage_t targetusage;
470  mw_venc_rate_control_t rate_control;
471  int32_t width;
472  int32_t height;
473  mw_venc_fps_t fps;
474  int32_t slice_num;
475  int32_t gop_pic_size;
476  int32_t gop_ref_size;
477  mw_venc_profile_t profile;
478  mw_venc_level_t level;
479  int32_t intel_async_depth;
480  mw_venc_amd_mem_type_t amd_mem_reserved;
481  int32_t yuv_is_full_range;
482  mw_venc_color_primaries_t color_primaries;
483  mw_venc_color_transfer_characteristic_t color_trc;
484  mw_venc_color_space_t color_space;
485  mw_venc_frame_field_mode_t frame_field_mode;
486  mw_venc_pic_struct_t pic_struct;
487 }mw_venc_param_t;
488 
499 typedef struct mw_venc_gpu_info {
500  char gpu_name[128];
501  mw_venc_platform_t platform;
502 }mw_venc_gpu_info_t;
503

MW_VENC_COLOR_SPACE_BT2020_CL

MW_VENC_TARGETUSAGE_BEST_QUALITY

MW_VENC_COLOR_TRC_ARIB_STD_B67
ARIB STD-B67, known as "Hybrid log-gamma".

"Logarithmic transfer characteristic (100:1 range)"

MW_ENCODER_CALLBACK
